passive.name: Living Vengeance
passive.description: On kill or assist, Varus temporarily gains Attack Damage and Ability Power. This bonus is larger if the enemy is a champion.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} When {{ci|Varus}} kills an enemy, he gains {{sti|attack speed|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}, {{sti|attack damage|{{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}}}}, and {{sti|ability power|{{as|ability power}}}} for a few seconds. The amount is based on his other sources of {{sti|as|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}, and is increased on an enemy {{tip|champion}} {{tip|takedown}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} When '''Varus''' kills an enemy, he gains {{sti|attack speed|{{as|{{pp|10 to 20|1;7;13|key=%}} '''bonus''' attack speed}}}} as well as {{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}} and {{as|ability power}} equal to {{as|10% '''bonus''' attack speed}} for {{pp|5 to 11 for 4|1 to 16}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: This is increased to {{as|50% '''bonus''' attack speed}} and {{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}} and {{as|ability power}} equal to {{as|25% '''bonus''' attack speed}} upon scoring a {{tip|champion}} {{tip|takedown}}.
wiki_detail.description3: While ''Living Vengeance's'' bonus is active, '''Varus' '''attack speed cap is increased to 3.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Living Vengeance's'' buff can be refreshed and is triggered when '''Varus''' kills any unit.
** The increased bonus gained from taking down an enemy champion takes priority over the lesser bonus. That bonus can only be refreshed by scoring another takedown.

Q.name: Piercing Arrow
Q.description: Varus readies and then fires a powerful shot that gains extra range and damage the longer he spends preparing to fire.
Q.tooltip:
Begin Charging: Varus draws back his next shot, Slowing himself by {{ e7 }}%. After {{ e5 }} seconds, if not fired, Varus will cancel the Ability and refund {{ e4 }}% of its Mana cost.

Release: Varus releases the arrow, dealing {{ totaldamagemintooltip }} physical damage, reduced by {{ e3 }}% per enemy hit (minimum {{ e9 }}%). Damage and Blight detonation effects are increased by up to {{ maxchargeamp*100 }}% based on charge time (maximum {{ totaldamagemax }}) .{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Varus}} {{tip|channel|charges}} up to a few seconds, increasing the {{sti|range}} of his shot. ''Piercing Arrow'' can be recast within the duration and will cancel automatically afterwards, refunding a portion of the {{sti|mana|{{as|mana cost}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Varus''' fires a piercing arrow in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit based on channel time.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Varus''' {{tip|channel|charges}} while being {{tip|slow|slowed}} by 20% for up to 4 seconds to increase ''Piercing Arrow's'' {{sti|range}} over the first {{fd|1.5}} seconds and its  effects over the first {{fd|1.25}} seconds of the channel.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Piercing Arrow'' can be recast within the duration. If the charge completes without reactivation, ''Piercing Arrow'' is cancelled and refunds {{sti|mana|{{as|50% of the mana cost}}}}.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Varus''' fires a piercing arrow in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit. The damage of the arrow as well as any detonated ''{{ai|Blighted Quiver|Varus|Blight}}'' stacks are both increased by {{pp|type=channel time|key=%|0 to 50 for 6|0 to 1.25|formula=2% per 0.05 seconds. ''This is capped at 1.25 seconds.''}}, and the arrow's damage is reduced by {{pp|type=number of enemies hit|key=%|0 to 60 for 5;67|0 to 5|formula=0% + (15% per enemy hit). ''This is capped at a maximum of 67%.''}}.
wiki_detail.leveling3:
{{st|Minimum Physical Damage|{{ap|90/1.5 to 370/1.5|round=2}} {{as|(+ {{ap|130/1.5 to 170/1.5|round=2}}% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Maximum Physical Damage|{{ap|90 to 370}} {{as|(+ {{ap|130 to 170|round=2}}% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
{{st|Minimum Reduced Damage|{{ap|90/1.5*0.33 to 370/1.5*0.33|round=2}} {{as|(+ {{ap|(130/1.5)*0.33 to (170/1.5)*0.33|round=2}}% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Maximum Reduced Damage|{{ap|90*0.33 to 370*0.33}} {{as|(+ {{ap|130*0.33 to 170*0.33|round=2}}% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{pp|type=channel time|895 to 1595|0 to 1.5 by 0.25|formula=825{{plus}}70{{plus}}(116.66 per 0.25 seconds). ''This is capped at 1.5 seconds.''}}
wiki_detail.cooldown: {{tt|{{ap|16 to 12}}|Starts post-effect, after charge ends the cooldown is reduced equal to the charge duration}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The arrow missile range is 825 to 1525; The range increases by 140 per {{fd|0.25}} seconds for the first {{fd|1.25}} seconds. Upon reaching its maximum range, it also strikes additional targets in a {{tip|er|icononly = true}} 70 radius, rounding off the struck area.
* The indicator for the range of the spell will be displayed for the entire channel.
* ''Piercing Arrow'' will cast from wherever '''Varus''' is at the end of the channel.
* At maximum effect charge, all damage caused by ''Piercing Arrow'' will trigger {{ccs||magic}}{{ccs|cosmetic critical strike|physical|link=true|tip=false}} text.
** In the game, {{ais|Blighted Quiver|Varus}} stack consumption and its active effect's damage through ''Piercing Arrow'' are incorrectly displayed as [[File:Critical strike magic icon.png|20px|link=]] real critical strikes.{{bug|1}}
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Varus''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
{{ct|charge|attack=false|move=true|cast={{ai|Blighted Quiver|Varus}} is usable during the first {{fd|0.85}} seconds, otherwise, it's disabled. {{ai|Hail of Arrows|Varus}} and {{ai|Chain of Corruption|Varus}} are disabled. This ability recasts to end channel.|items=false|consume=Disabled, but can still use trinkets.|spells=true, true, false, false, recasts}}

W.name: Blighted Quiver
W.description: Passive: Varus' basic attacks deal bonus magic damage and apply Blight. Varus' other abilities detonate Blight, dealing magic damage based on the target's maximum Health. Active: Varus empowers his next Piercing Arrow.

variables.q_mod: {{pp|0 to 50 for 11|0 to 1.25|key=%|type=[[File:Varus Piercing Arrow.png|20px|border]] ''Piercing Arrow's'' charge time|formula=5% per 0.125 seconds. ''This is capped at 1.25 seconds.''|round1=3

wiki_detail.key:
%|type=[[File:Varus Piercing Arrow.png|20px|border]] ''Piercing Arrow's'' charge time|formula=5% per 0.125 seconds. ''This is capped at 1.25 seconds.''|round1=3}}}}<!-- Charge scaling formula, this replacing is only done for convenience. In-game the charge scaling is separate for each part of the ability.

The following values are defined as parameters.
-->{{#vardefine:cdr|13}}<!--Blight detonation: single-stack cooldown reduction as a PERCENTAGE
-->{{#vardefine:b1|3}}<!--  Blight detonation: rank 1 single-stack max HP ratio as a PERCENTAGE
-->{{#vardefine:b5|5}}<!--  Blight detonation: rank 5 single-stack max HP ratio as a PERCENTAGE
-->{{#vardefine:ap|1.5}}<!--Blight detonation: single-stack max HP ratio per 100 AP as a PERCENTAGE
-->{{#vardefine:a1|6}}<!--  Active: rank 1 missing HP ratio as a PERCENTAGE
-->{{#vardefine:a2|14}}<!-- Active: rank 5 missing HP ratio as a PERCENTAGE
-->{{{{{1<noinclude>|Ability data</noinclude>}}}|Blighted Quiver|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}}
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Varus'''' [[basic attack]]s are empowered to deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} and apply a [[stack]] of ''Blight'' {{tip|on-hit}} for 6 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and stacking up to 3 times. '''Varus' ''' abilities detonate all ''Blight'' stacks on enemies hit, consuming them to apply new effects.
wiki_detail.description2:
{{sbc|Blight:}} For each stack consumed, the target is dealt {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}. If the stacks were consumed with ''{{ai|Piercing Arrow|Varus}}'', this damage is increased by {{#var:q_mod}}. This damage is capped at {{ap|360/3}} per stack against {{tip|monsters}}, for a total cap of 360 at maximum stacks.

Additionally, each stack consumed against a {{tip|champion}} or epic {{tip|monster}} reduces the {{sti|'''remaining''' cooldowns}} of '''Varus' ''' basic abilities by {{#var:cdr}}% of each of their '''total''' cooldowns, up to a {{ap|{{#var:cdr}}*3}}% cooldown reduction per target. If the stacks were consumed with ''{{ai|Piercing Arrow|Varus}}'', the cooldown reduction is increased by {{#var:q_mod}}, up to a {{pp|{{#var:cdr}}*3 to {{#var:cdr}}*3*1.5|0 to 1.25 by 0.125|key=%|type=[[File:Varus Piercing Arrow.png|20px|border]] Piercing Arrow's charge time|formula=39%+1.95% per 0.125 seconds. ''This is capped at 1.25 seconds.''|round1=3|showtype=false}} cooldown reduction per target from consuming maximum stacks against them.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Bonus Magic Damage per Stack|{{as|{{ap|{{#var:b1}} to {{#var:b5}}}}% {{as|(+ {{fd|{{#var:ap}}}}% per 100 AP)}} of the target's '''maximum''' health|health)}}|Bonus Magic Damage at Max Stacks|{{as|{{ap|{{#var:b1}}*3 to {{#var:b5}}*3}}% {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:ap}}*3}}% per 100 AP)}} of the target's '''maximum''' health|health)}}}}
{{st|[[File:Varus Piercing Arrow.png|20px|border|link=]] Maximum Bonus Magic Damage per Stack|{{as|{{ap|{{#var:b1}}*1.5 to {{#var:b5}}*1.5}}% {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:ap}}*1.5}}% per 100 AP)}} of the target's '''maximum''' health|health)}}|[[File:Varus Piercing Arrow.png|20px|border|link=]] Maximum Bonus Magic Damage at Max Stacks|{{as|{{ap|{{#var:b1}}*3*1.5 to {{#var:b5}}*3*1.5}}% {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:ap}}*3*1.5}}% per 100 AP)}} of the target's '''maximum''' health|health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Varus'''' next ''{{ai|Piercing Arrow|Varus}}'' within {{fd|5.5}} seconds is empowered to deal {{as|'''additional bonus''' magic damage|magic damage}}. This damage is further increased by {{#var:q_mod}}. This damage is capped at 360 against {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Active Magic Damage|{{as|{{ap|{{#var:a1}} to {{#var:a2}}}}% of target's '''missing''' health}}|Increased Active Magic Damage|{{as|{{ap|{{#var:a1}}*1.5 to {{#var:a2}}*1.5}}% of target's '''missing''' health}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: If '''Varus''' does not cast ''{{ai|Piercing Arrow|Varus}}'', ''Blighted Quiver'' can be recast after 1 second within the duration, and does so automatically afterwards or when he dies. ''Blighted Quiver'' can be cast during the first {{fd|0.85}} seconds of ''{{ais|Piercing Arrow|Varus}}'' charge, and will be placed on full cooldown after the charge ends even if ''{{ai|Piercing Arrow|Varus}}'' is not recast.
wiki_detail.description5: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Varus''' ends ''Blighted Quiver'' and places it on a 1-second cooldown.
wiki_detail.description6: ''Blighted Quiver's active and recast can both be used while affected by {{tip|cast-inhibiting crowd control}}.''
wiki_detail.cooldown: {{tt|40|Starts after the effect is used with Piercing Arrow}}
wiki_detail.knockdown:
|notes        = 
* The monster damage cap is also increased by {{#var:q_mod}} if the stacks were consumed with ''{{ai|Piercing Arrow|Varus}}''.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will not block the {{tip|on-hit}} damage but will block the consumption damage if the target is hit by his abilities.
* ''Blighted Quiver's'' active damage is dealt after the damage of {{ai|Piercing Arrow|Varus}}.
* ''Blighted Quiver'' does not count as an ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
* The attacks do not affect [[structures]] nor [[ward]]s.
* {{Pending for test}}: ''Blighted Quiver's'' on-hit interaction with ''parrying'' effects ({{tip|dodge}}, {{tip|block}}, {{tip|blind}}).
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{cis|Varus}} basic attacks deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} and apply a stack of ''Blight'', which stacks up to 3 times. '''Varus' '''abilities consume all ''Blight'' stacks on enemies hit to apply the effect.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Varus' '''next ''{{ai|Piercing Arrow|Varus}}'' within a few seconds is empowered to deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} to enemies based on {{as|their '''missing''' health}}, increased based on charge time. If he does not cast ''{{ai|Piercing Arrow|Varus}}'', ''Blighted Quiver'' can be recast within the duration, and does so automatically afterwards.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Varus''' ends ''Blighted Quiver'', placing it on a {{sti|cd|brief}} cooldown.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Blight:}} For each stack consumed, the target is dealt {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} based on their {{as|health}}. Against a {{tip|champion}} or epic {{tip|monster}}, his basic abilities' {{sti|cooldown}} is {{sti|cdr|reduced}}. If {{ai|Piercing Arrow|Varus}} consumes the stacks, both the damage and the cooldown reduction are increased based on its charge time.

E.name: Hail of Arrows
E.description: Varus fires a hail of arrows that deal physical damage and desecrate the ground. Desecrated ground slows enemies' Move Speed and reduces their self healing and regeneration.
E.tooltip: Varus fires a hail of arrows that deals {{ totaldamage }} physical damage and desecrates the ground for {{ e3 }} seconds, Slowing enemies by {{ slowpercent*-100 }}% and applying {{ grievousamount*100 }}% Grievous Wounds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Varus}} fires a hail of arrows to the target location that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The area then becomes desecrated for a few seconds, {{tip|slow|slowing}} enemies within and inflicting them with {{tip|Grievous Wounds}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{tip|Grievous Wounds|nolink=true}}:}} The target receives reduced {{tip|heal|healing}} and {{as|{{sti|health regeneration}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Varus''' fires a hail of arrows at the target location that land after {{fd|0.5}} seconds, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description2: The area then becomes desecrated for 4 seconds, {{tip|slow|slowing}} enemies within and inflicting them with {{tip|Grievous Wounds}}.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Hail of Arrows will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{tip|Slow}} lingers for {{fd|0.25}} seconds after leaving the marked area.
* ''Hail of Arrows'' consumes {{ai|Blighted Quiver|Varus}} stacks for bonus damage a second time after ~{{fd|0.3}} seconds of hitting, allowing stacks applied during this time to be triggered.

R.name: Chain of Corruption
R.description: Varus flings out a damaging tendril of corruption that immobilizes the first enemy champion hit and then spreads towards nearby uninfected champions, immobilizing them too on contact.
R.tooltip:
Varus flings out a tendril of corruption, Rooting the first champion hit for {{ e2 }} seconds and dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage. Rooted enemies gain {{ e4 }} Blight stacks over the duration.

The corruption spreads from its target to uninfected enemy champions. If it reaches them, they take the same damage and Root.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Varus}} unleashes a tendril in the target direction that infects the first enemy champion hit, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|root|rooting}} them for a short time. They are also {{tip|standard sight|revealed}} and rapidly inflicted with ''{{ai|Blighted Quiver|Varus|Blight}}'' stacks.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Upon impact, the tendril roots into the ground from which it {{tip|tethers}} to nearby enemy {{tip|champions}}. If a target stays within range after its duration, they become infected and a new tendril will spread from them.
wiki_detail.blurb4: ''Chain of Corruption's'' spread can repeat indefinitely until there are no new targets.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Varus''' unleashes a tendril of corruption in the target direction that infects the first enemy champion hit, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|root|rooting}} them for 2 seconds, during which they are {{tip|standard sight|revealed}}. Over the first {{fd|1.5}} seconds of the root, they are also inflicted with maximum stacks of ''{{ai|Blighted Quiver|Varus|Blight}}''.
wiki_detail.description2: Upon impact, the tendril roots into the ground from which it seeks out nearby enemy {{tip|champions}}. If a target does not leave the area within 2 seconds, they subsequently become infected as well, taking the same damage and effects. A new tendril is then spread out from the infected target that is closest to a nearby uninfected enemy champion. The infection can spread repeatedly until there are no new targets.
wiki_detail.description3: ''The target does not have to be {{tip|sight|visible}} to be caught by the tendril.''
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|1370|Missile plus area check total range}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Enemy champions can be targeted again by the corruption's tether if they were not infected the previous time, even if they were targeted and got out of range.
* A tendril that roots into the ground will only seek nearby enemy champions that were already in the area.
* ''Chain of Corruption'' will not infect {{tip|cc-immune|crowd control immune}} targets or those protected by {{tip|spell shield|spell shields}} (but will still seek them).
* '''Varus''' will turn to face the target direction at the start of the cast.
* The tendril cannot seek enemy champions that are {{tip|untargetable}}.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
* Consuming the ''Blight's'' stacks applied by ''Chain of Corruption'' will deal bonus magic damage based on {{ais|Blighted Quiver|Varus}} rank. If the ability hasn't been ranked yet, the three ''Blight'' stacks will still be applied but they will be considered to be at rank 0, dealing {{as|{{fd|1.25}}% {{as|(+ 2% per 100 AP)}} of the target's '''maximum''' health}} per stack.
